name: Kidney Bean
recipeIngredient: 1 can Ro-Tel Diced Tomatoes and Green Chilies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine beans, corn, rice, green onions and Ro-Tel; set aside.
2. In a 1-cup measure, combine remaining ingredients: lemon juice, red wine vinegar, lemon peel, olive oil, and sugar.
3. Pour the mixture over the bean mixture.
4. Toss gently to coat evenly.
5. Chill for 3 to 4 hours before serving.
6. Serves 6.
Note: You may substitute lime for the lemon.
